recommendations.overview: A group of contest winners arrive at an island hotel to live out their dreams, only to find themselves trapped in nightmare scenarios.

recommendations.title: The Curse of Bridge Hollow
recommendations.overview: A Halloween-hating dad reluctantly teams up with his teenage daughter when an evil spirit wreaks havoc by making their town's decorations come to life.

recommendations.title: Truth or Dare
recommendations.overview: A harmless game of "Truth or Dare" among friends turns deadly when someone—or something—begins to punish those who tell a lie—or refuse the dare.

recommendations.title: Delirious
recommendations.overview: A soap opera writer gets hit on the head and wakes up as a character in his own show.

recommendations.title: Septembers of Shiraz
recommendations.overview: In this adaptation of the critically acclaimed debut novel by Iranian American author Dalia Sofer, a secular Jewish family is caught up in the maelstrom of the 1979 Iranian Revolution.

recommendations.overview: A cranky, retired author reluctantly embarks on a final book tour to help out a young publisher.
